mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpm_batch_exec_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE bpm_batch_exec_log SET current_step = #{step} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE bpm_batch_exec_log SET status = 'SUCCESS', current_step = '完成', instance_count = #{instanceCount}, office_count = #{officeCount}, deliverable_count = #{deliverableCount}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
